name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Orange Park, FL pawn shop at Value Pawn & Jewelry on Blanding Blvd offers fast cash loans and jewelry sales.
description_long:
Orange Park, FL residents can find Value Pawn & Jewelry at 683 Blanding Blvd, a standalone pawn shop serving the Orange Park community. Open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 9 AM to 6 PM, and Sunday from noon to 5 PM, this Orange Park location provides convenient access to quick cash loans, jewelry purchases, and merchandise browsing.

This Orange Park branch specializes in quick cash loans against collateral, jewelry buying and selling, and general merchandise retail. Contact the store at 904-213-1119 to ask about current inventory, loan terms, or to discuss what items they might accept.

If you need fast cash or are looking to buy or sell jewelry in Orange Park, FL, bring a valid ID and any items you'd like to pawn or sell. This location serves the surrounding neighborhood with straightforward, no-hassle pawn services.
pros: Offers instant online quotes for electronics appraisals via their Instant Quote tool
Extended store hours (9am-7pm weekdays, open Sundays) provide accessibility for working customers
Layaway option with only 10% down and monthly payments locks in prices without financing fees
EZ+ Rewards Program allows online payment management and point accumulation on eligible transactions
Expert precious metals testing and claimed fair pricing on gold and diamond jewelry purchases
Jewelry VIP protection plan includes guaranteed loan amounts and 100% trade-up value on future purchases
Diverse inventory across multiple categories (electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, fashion) updated daily
cons: Website provides no disclosure of interest rates, fees, or specific loan terms for pawn transactions
All retail merchandise is pre-owned despite marketing emphasis on 'brand-name' and 'quality'—no new items
Pawn loans require forfeiture of collateral if unpaid, making this a high-risk credit option compared to unsecured alternatives
Third-party 'Take Today' financing partners are not clearly identified and credit eligibility varies without transparency on APR or terms
Protection plans and rewards programs contain unspecified conditions ('not all services available in all areas') that limit applicability
best_for: Customers with valuable collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools) who need same-day or next-day cash
Consumers seeking discounted pre-owned electronics or jewelry at 25-70% off retail without credit checks
Shoppers who prefer layaway purchases to avoid credit and build discipline with 10% down monthly payments
Individuals with no access to traditional credit who have exhausted other borrowing options
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is appropriate for customers with collateral who need emergency cash access or want to purchase discounted pre-owned merchandise. The critical caveat: pawn loans carry no published interest rates or terms on the website, loss of collateral is the enforcement mechanism, and this is a high-cost credit option suitable only when traditional alternatives are unavailable—borrowers must visit in person to understand actual costs before committing.
services: Pawn loans—collateral-based loans on items in working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with expert precious metals testing
Retail merchandise sales (pre-owned electronics, jewelry, tools, fashion, gaming)
Layaway with 10% down and monthly payments
Third-party flexible payment financing (up to 12 months, subject to credit approval)
Firearms sales (where permitted by state law)
Online shopping with daily inventory updates and Instant Quote tool for electronics
EZ+ Rewards Program with online payment management and point accumulation
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning/repairs
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise coverage
Gold buying with instant cash on the spot
meta_description: Orange Park, FL pawn shop at Value Pawn & Jewelry, 683 Blanding Blvd. Fast cash loans and jewelry sales.
